description: CompositionBlack running shorts made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has an attached underwear on the inside, elasticated waistband with a drawstring, blue panel detailing on the sides and swoosh logo in a reflective material towards the left hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryBuilt with the breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike running shorts comes in a simple design with blue accents. This high-performance short created from Dri-Fit fabric wicks sweat away from the body and keeps you cool, dry and comfortable. Team it with tees and running shoes.
